name: micro-exp
description: /micro-exp [scope] — context-driven micro-experiment sweep orchestrator (domain-agnostic). Self-enumerate sweep candidates from the conversation / active domain (no manifest file — like /cycle) → Stage 1.5 per-candidate infra existence check (HALT to /cycle-bg when missing) → rent pods (≤budget) → copy inputs → run → Monitor (kind-appropriate alive-check) → on JOB DONE harvest+down + dispatch parse Agent → atlas register on green for closed-form-atom-shaped kinds (skip for observation-only) → aggregate ledger at exports/sweep/<batch>/. Inverse of one-big-run: N small verify-able experiments in parallel; honest sweep (FALSIFIED is CLOSED-negative, never skipped — g63). 0.4.0 lands the domain-agnostic generalization: kind is ABSTRACT (materials wall · LLM bench · web smoke · build bench are all examples among many; no kind hard-coded as default), Stage 1.5 infra existence check (verify the four generic prereqs <runnable>+<inputs>+<parser>+<workdir> per candidate; HALT with 'N/M candidates missing dispatch infrastructure — /cycle-bg <active-domain> required first' when any miss), and a /cycle-bg ↔ /micro-exp decision tree cross-linked in both SKILL.md (BUILD lane vs FIRE lane; mirrors skills/cycle/SKILL.md). Local-pool adapter generalized — works on ANY kind that has a <runnable> + <parser>. Bare = current context · arg = scope filter. Distinct from /cycle (milestone-driven loop) and /all-bg-go (reactive single fan-out). NL trigger via skill ('/micro-exp', 'sweep these', 'verify-driven sweep', 'build then fire', 'infra missing').
